title: Day 10 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition 2
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - なん にん　います か。 (nan nin imas ka =  How many people are there?

Sentence 2 - さん にん　います。 (san nin imas) = There are three.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
